name: anybox-plugin-development
description: Anybox 插件开发指南，帮助创建、审查和验证第三方插件包。

interface.shortDescription: 创建和验证 Anybox/Fanfande 插件包。
interface.longDescription: 将 Anybox 第三方插件开发指南打包为可安装插件，提供插件包结构、plugin.json、bundled skill、MCP server、connector、registry metadata 和验证流程的操作说明。
defaultPrompt: 使用 Anybox 插件开发 skill 创建或验证一个插件包。

skillPreviews.name: anybox-plugin-development
skillPreviews.description: 创建、审查或验证 Anybox/Fanfande 第三方插件包。Use when the user asks to make a plugin, convert an API/SaaS/local tool into an installable plugin, write plugin.json, add plugin MCP servers, add bundled plugin skills, define plugin-owned connectors with API key or OAuth credentials, package plugin metadata, or debug plugin catalog/install/diagnostic failures.
